name: Chocolate Walnut Filled Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons granulated fructose or other sugar replacement
1 teaspoon granulated fructose or other sugar replacement
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 3-quart size tube pan.
For the Cake: Sift dry ingredients into a bowl. Add remaining ingredients and beat until smooth and creamy. Pour batter into prepared pan.
To make the filling: Combine all ingredients in a bowl, mixing with a fork until well blended. Spoon filling over center of chocolate layer, being careful not to touch sides of pan.
Bake for 35 minutes or until a tester comes out clean. Cool in pan for 20-25 minutes, then invert onto a plate or rack and let cool completely.
Frost with a glaze if desired. Makes 24 servings (84 calories per serving). Exchanges: 2/3 bread, 1/2 lean meat.
